title: A Comprehensive Spatially Resolved Metabolomics Dataset for Lampreys.
author: Gou M Wang X Duan X Wang Y Pang Y Dong Y
content: S-EPMC11447254 PMC11447254 A Comprehensive Spatially Resolved Metabolomics Dataset for Lampreys. As one of the two most ancient groups of extant vertebrates, lamprey has become an important model organism in various fields of biology.
